hero.headline: Premium timber floors, installed beautifully.
hero.subheadline: Jamien Flooring supplies and installs engineered timber, hybrid, laminate and vinyl across Sydney's North Shore. Clear pricing, honest advice, and a clean finish.

about.title: Why Sydney homeowners choose Jamien Flooring
bullets: Premium engineered timber craftsmanship (oak, modern boards, feature patterns)
Great-value hybrid, laminate and vinyl options — suited to families and rentals
Sydney North Shore service with reliable scheduling and tidy workmanship
Straightforward product advice and transparent quotes
Free measure & quote — send suburb + m² (or floor plan) for a fast estimate
about.note: We help you choose the right floor for your style, budget and daily life — then install it properly.

categories.name: Engineered Timber
categories.description: Warm timber look with improved stability.

items.name: Hybrid Flooring · Option 1
items.subtitle: Water-resistant
items.description: Premium water-resistant hybrid flooring perfect for kitchens and moisture-prone areas. Advanced locking system ensures easy installation with superior stability and durability for active households.

items.name: Hybrid Flooring · Option 2
items.subtitle: Family friendly
items.description: Designed for busy households with kids and pets. Combines durability with comfort underfoot, featuring scratch-resistant wear layer and easy maintenance. Forgiving to spills and everyday wear.

items.name: Hybrid Flooring · Option 3
items.subtitle: Scratch resistant
items.description: Heavy-duty scratch-resistant hybrid engineered for high-traffic areas. Superior wear protection keeps your floors looking fresh for years. Maintains authentic wood appearance while providing superior protection.

items.name: Hybrid Flooring · Option 4
items.subtitle: Easy maintenance
items.description: Low-maintenance hybrid flooring requiring only regular vacuuming and occasional damp mopping. Quick-dry surface means no puddles or water damage concerns. Perfect for busy homeowners wanting effortless floors.

items.name: Hybrid Flooring · Option 5
items.subtitle: Great value
items.description: Excellent value hybrid flooring delivering premium look and performance at an accessible price. Combines authentic timber aesthetic with modern durability, ideal for budget-conscious homeowners without compromising quality.

items.name: Engineered Timber · Option 1
items.subtitle: Natural timber feel
items.description: Premium engineered oak timber with authentic natural grain and warm tone. Features real timber veneer with stable core, perfect for climate-conscious Sydney homes. Delivers the elegance of solid hardwood with superior durability.

items.name: Engineered Timber · Option 2
items.subtitle: Stable performance
items.description: Engineered timber with exceptional dimensional stability, designed to resist warping and movement in Sydney's variable climate. Multi-ply core construction ensures consistent performance across temperature and humidity changes.

items.name: Engineered Timber · Option 3
items.subtitle: Premium look
items.description: High-end engineered timber with elegant European oak finish and hand-scraped details. Creates sophisticated, designer appearance with rich colour variation and character markings throughout.

items.name: Engineered Timber · Option 4
items.subtitle: Warm & timeless
items.description: Classic engineered timber with warm honey-toned finish that complements any décor style. Timeless appeal ensures lasting beauty, while engineered construction provides modern performance and reliability.

items.name: Engineered Timber · Option 5
items.subtitle: Multiple finishes
items.description: Versatile engineered timber available in matte, satin and gloss finishes to match your style. Choose from contemporary minimalist to rustic character looks. Engineered stability across all finish options ensures consistent performance.

items.name: Laminate · Option 1
items.subtitle: Budget friendly
items.description: Affordable laminate flooring delivering great looks at exceptional value. Perfect for rental properties and investment homes. Budget-conscious option without sacrificing appearance or basic durability requirements.

items.name: Laminate · Option 2
items.subtitle: Tough wear layer
items.description: Commercial-grade laminate with reinforced wear layer resisting scratches and stains from heavy foot traffic. Engineered for durability in high-use environments while maintaining attractive timber-look appearance.

items.name: Laminate · Option 3
items.subtitle: Modern styles
items.description: Contemporary laminate flooring in sleek modern tones and patterns. Perfect for contemporary homes seeking trendy aesthetic. Wide range of finishes from matte to embossed textures for modern interior design.

items.name: Laminate · Option 4
items.subtitle: Quick installation
items.description: Laminate with click-together locking system enabling fast installation without glue or nails. Reduces labour costs and installation time. Ideal for quick renovations and fast-track projects across Sydney.

items.name: Laminate · Option 5
items.subtitle: Easy care
items.description: No-fuss laminate requiring simple vacuuming and occasional light damp mopping. Naturally resistant to staining and fading. Ideal for busy families wanting beautiful floors with minimal maintenance effort.

items.name: Vinyl · Option 1
items.subtitle: Soft underfoot
items.description: Cushioned vinyl flooring offering exceptional comfort underfoot with warm, forgiving surface. Reduces fatigue in kitchens and high-traffic areas. Warm, soft feel combines comfort with practical water-resistance.

items.name: Vinyl · Option 2
items.subtitle: Quiet & comfy
items.description: Thick vinyl with acoustic underlay dampens sound and impacts for quiet, peaceful homes. Combines comfort of plush feel with superior noise reduction. Perfect for apartments and lower-floor living spaces.

items.name: Vinyl · Option 3
items.subtitle: Water-resistant
items.description: Fully water-resistant vinyl ideal for bathrooms, laundries and wet areas. Waterproof core prevents water penetration and swelling. Practical choice for moisture-prone spaces requiring durable, easy-clean flooring.

items.name: Vinyl · Option 4
items.subtitle: Easy cleaning
items.description: Zero-maintenance vinyl flooring with sealed surface resisting dirt, stains and spills. Wipe clean with damp cloth for spotless results. Perfect for busy households seeking maximum convenience.

items.name: Vinyl · Option 5
items.subtitle: Great for units
items.description: Ideal vinyl for unit and apartment living. Click-together installation reduces disturbance to neighbours. Quiet underfoot, easy to maintain, and stain-resistant for apartment durability requirements.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: Installed engineered oak throughout our home. The finish and detailing were outstanding. Very professional and tidy workmanship.

reviews.name: Angela W.
reviews.text: Beautiful timber flooring installed exactly as promised. The colour and grain selection really elevated the space.

reviews.name: Sarah T.
reviews.text: We replaced carpet with hybrid flooring. Great price and quick turnaround. Perfect for our kids and dog.

reviews.name: Michael K.
reviews.text: Affordable laminate option for our investment property. Clean job and easy to deal with.
